title: Quantization & Pruning, Side by Side
tagline: Shrink a model to int8 / int4 / sparse — and see exactly when accuracy falls off the cliff
summary: Live network on a 2-D classification toy: slide the quantization bit-width from 16 down to 1, and the pruning ratio from 0% to 95%. Watch accuracy vs model size. Then PTQ vs QAT vs lottery-ticket explained with the right cost/benefit per technique.
highlights: Train a small MLP; live quantization slider from FP16 down to 1-bit weights; per-bit-width accuracy.
Magnitude-pruning ratio slider; see decision boundary crack only above ~80% sparsity.
Size-vs-accuracy curve with PTQ vs QAT vs structured-pruning markers.
Lottery ticket panel: prune + reset + retrain; watch the subnetwork train as well as the original.
